perspectives.description: The DECIDER is the person contemplating whether to continue supporting their childhood friend or to prioritize their own wellbeing by cutting them out of their life. Their decision will significantly impact both their own mental health and their friend's situation.

The PRIMARY_AFFECTED is the childhood friend who has become negative and mean, relying on the DECIDER for emotional support during a difficult time. Their wellbeing and ability to cope with their struggles are directly tied to the DECIDER's choice.

The THIRD_PARTY is a mutual friend who observes the deteriorating relationship between the DECIDER and the PRIMARY_AFFECTED. They may feel concerned about both individuals and how the situation affects their wider social circle.
